name: sdlc-agents
description: Codex plugin for SDLC workflows with Jira integration through Atlassian MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, track, and update Jira work from Codex.
interface.longDescription: SDLC Agents connects Codex to Jira Cloud through Atlassian's official remote MCP server, with guided workflows for assigned work, JQL search, issue creation, comments, transitions, boards, and sprints. It also documents a REST fallback for API-token environments.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use SDLC Agents to show my latest Jira task.
